A

actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class UserInterface
Actionlistener interface for entry textfield.
addItem(Item) - Method in class Room
add and Item to the room
addItemList(Item) - Method in class ItemList
add an Item to the hashmap (of player and room), similar to setExit this method only need one paramètre because the key of the item is the same with the item's name
addStep() - Method in class Player
add 1 to the step count of the player

B

Beamer - Class in Unnamed Package
Beamer allows user to charge a room to be teleported back whenever used
Beamer(String, String, int, Room, int) - Constructor for class Beamer
contructeur par défaut

C

canBeUse() - Method in class Beamer
return true if the beamer can be used, false other wise
chargeRoom(Room) - Method in class Beamer
charge room
Command - Class in Unnamed Package
Classe Command - une commande du jeu d'aventure Zuul.

CommandWords - Class in Unnamed Package
Command word, stored valid command
CommandWords() - Constructor for class CommandWords
 

E

enable(boolean) - Method in class UserInterface
Enable or disable input in the entry field.

F

findRandomRoom() - Method in class RoomRandomizer
findRandomRoom return a random room on the tab this will be called by another method on TransporterRoom

G

Create the game and initialise its internal map.

Game Engine
GameEngine() - Constructor for class GameEngine
start the game
getChargedRoom() - Method in class Beamer
 
getCommand(String) - Method in class Parser
Get a new command from the user.
getCommandList() - Method in class CommandWords
return all valid words without printing it like "showall" procedure
getCommandString() - Method in class Parser
Returns a String with valid command words.
getCommandWord() - Method in class Command
return first word (Command word)
getCurrentRoom() - Method in class Player
return the current room
getDescription() - Method in class Room
to get description (a String) of a room
getExit(String) - Method in class Room
go to the direction base on the input of the player
getExit(String) - Method in class TransporterRoom
getExit
getExitString() - Method in class Room
return all of the possible exit of a room avoid coupling in getLocationInfo and no exit
getFloor() - Method in class UserInterface
getFloor
getImageName() - Method in class Room
Return a string describing the room's image name
getInventoryInfo() - Method in class Player
this method return information of the inventory the item that has been put in and the amount of weight the player can carry left
getItem(String) - Method in class ItemList
getItem allows player to take an item from a room
getItemDescription() - Method in class Item
return the description of the item
getItemList() - Method in class Player
accesseur of the inventory
getItemList() - Method in class Room
return the list of the room
getItemLongDescription() - Method in class Item
return the name, description and weight of the item
getItemNom() - Method in class Item
return the name of the item
getItemString() - Method in class ItemList
this method return all of the item in HashMap
getItemWeight() - Method in class Item
return the weight of the item
getLongDescription() - Method in class Room
print the current info, including the current location, items and exit once we add items or monster we only need to change this class
getPreRoom() - Method in class Player
return the Stack preRoom of the player this stack store the previous room that the player has passed
getRoomItemString() - Method in class Room
getItemString is already declared in itemlist so the name is changed to getRoomItemString()
getRoomItemString1() - Method in class Room
getItemString is already declared in itemlist so the name is changed to getRoomItemString()
getSecondWord() - Method in class Command
return second word
getShortDescription() - Method in class Room
return the description of the room
getStep() - Method in class Player
return the number of steps the player has taken
getTimeUsed() - Method in class Beamer
return how many time left the beamer can be used
getWeight() - Method in class Player
accesseur of the weight

I

isExit(Room) - Method in class Room
detect wether or not the room (paramètre) exit in the HashMap "exits"
isUnknown() - Method in class Command
detect whether or not the word is valid (in class CommandWords)

setUse add or subtract the amount of time the beamer can be used

Whenever the player leave the transporter room he will be randomly put in one of the room

U

UserInterface - Class in Unnamed Package
